data.body:
Flapjack octopuses (genus Opisthoteuthis) are an adorable genus of deep sea octopuses. They have gelatinous bodies that can make them look like a pancake when they sit on the sea floor

Their fins are smaller than those of other cirrate octopuses, but it does mean they look like they have tiny ears

data.body: There is an Ottoman modernity narrative, to be sure, but I consider the real start of *global* modernity to be the Mongol Empire. It dismantled so utterly it's forgotten the world order that replaced it and laid the foundations of multiple modern states.

data.body: And this is also, incidentally, one reason why Spanish, Portuguese, and Russian nationalism all have that strangely defensive inferiority complex factors to them. Rooting the oldest narratives in 'occupiers out of our country' and a crusader mentality does bad things to cultures.

Kitty-Boo was hunting a bug today. I've never seen one like this before - it looked cool with that dark blue metallic colour. I looked it up and it's a black oil beetle, and I loved it until I found out that it parasitizes solitary bees 😞 Sometimes it's better not to know.

#nature #insects
